name: gradle-grill
description: Stress-test Gradle/AGP implementation choices against the official documentation.

interface.shortDescription: Challenge Gradle/AGP variants and pick the most idiomatic.
interface.longDescription: Generates 2–4 candidate variants for a Gradle/AGP implementation choice, cross-checks each against the official Gradle docs (via gradle-rag) and relevant AGP, Gradle, Kotlin, or KSP source, ranks them by adherence to documented best practices, and recommends the most idiomatic option with citations.
